title: ARVO Brown Packing Tape 3 Rolls with Low Noise (48mm x 60m) - Durable Parcel Sealing Tape for Packing Boxes, Secure Packaging for Moving House
features: Good Adhesive Strength: Our brown packing tape ensures parcels stay securely sealed during transit, providing a reliable hold on various surfaces for dependable packaging.

Temperature and Water Resistant: Our brown tape performs well in various temperature conditions, from cold to hot climates, and offers water resistance to protect packages from moisture damage during transit.

50 Micron Thickness: With a robust 50-micron thickness, this tape is durable enough to secure packages without being too bulky, ensuring a professional and neat appearance. Dimensions: Each roll measures 48mm in width and 60m in length, providing ample tape for multiple uses.
Low Noise Unwinding: The tape unwinds with minimal noise, making it ideal for use in quieter environments, such as offices and homes, enhancing your packing experience.
Easy to Use: Compatible with standard tape dispensers, our packaging tape is easy to apply and cut, ensuring a hassle-free sealing process for your parcels and boxes.
Multi-Purpose Application: Perfect for wrapping, moving and shipping, this versatile brown tape meets all your packing needs, whether for home, office, or commercial use.

Flexible Value Pack Options: Choose from 3-pack, 6-pack, or 12-pack bundles, offering a budget-friendly solution for all your packing needs. Whether you’re moving house or shipping goods, there's a perfect pack size for you.

Convenient Storage: Keep your tape in optimal condition by storing unused rolls indoors, away from sunlight and moisture. The brown colour gives your packages a professional and eye-catching appearance upon delivery.
